title: Combined lineage tracing and scRNA-seq reveals unexpected first heart field predominance of human iPSC differentiation
author: Galdos, Francisco Xavier
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: This repository contains the Seurat object saved as an RDS for the single cell RNA sequencing data for the published manuscript in Galdos et al, eLife, 2023 (PMID: 37284748). A CSV containing cell annotation metadata is included which contains each cell barcode with corresponding annotation, Cell line, and timepoint of collection.
